---
name: Pattern proposal
about: Propose a new accessibility pattern or update an existing one
title: "pattern: "
labels: pattern
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What pattern is being proposed or updated?

## Problem

What recurring accessibility problem should this pattern address?

## Applies To

- [ ] Design
- [ ] Development
- [ ] Content
- [ ] Cross-discipline

## Preferred Approach

What approach should the repository recommend?

## Approaches To Avoid

What should the pattern explicitly discourage?

## Evidence Or References

Which principles, references, or findings support this pattern?

## Example Scenarios

List representative situations where this pattern applies.

## Notes

Anything else needed before drafting the pattern.
